alert-001.contentSnippet: Thread discussing credential stuffing tools targeting UK banks. User shares leaked database with 50k email/password combos...

entities.context: C2 server IP mentioned in tutorial

alert-001.contentSnippet: Reply confirming success rate of 12% on Barclays accounts using the shared combo list...

alert-002.contentSnippet: Premium SIM swap service - UK networks only. Guaranteed bypass of SMS OTP within 4 hours. Pricing: 500 GBP per swap...
Proof of successful Starling OTP bypass posted by vendor with redacted screenshot...

alert-003.contentSnippet: NatWest phishing kit v3.2 - includes real-time credential relay, anti-bot protection bypass, and mobile-responsive design...

alert-004.contentSnippet: CNP fraud suite v2.1 released. Features: BIN checker, AVS bypass, 3DS bypass attempt module. Supports UK card ranges...

alert-005.contentSnippet: UK document package - includes DVLA driving licence, council tax bill, bank statement template. Ready for KYC verification...
Sample outputs showing high-quality UK driving licence forgeries that passed automated ID verification at 3 banks...

alert-006.contentSnippet: Account opening service using verified KYC documents. We open accounts at NatWest and Halifax within 48 hours...

alert-007.contentSnippet: Guide to exploiting DD mandate vulnerabilities. Target dormant accounts with small initial amounts then escalate...

alert-008.contentSnippet: Mule recruitment post: Easy money for students! Just receive and forward bank transfers. We provide full instructions...

alert-009.contentSnippet: Investment platform clone - mirrors FCA registered firm. Captures full banking credentials during deposit flow...

alert-010.contentSnippet: Complete vishing playbook for Barclays customers. Includes spoofed number setup, script templates, and objection handling...

alert-011.contentSnippet: ATO toolkit release: session hijacking via stolen cookies. Works on all major UK banks. Includes proxy rotation...

alert-012.contentSnippet: Real-time OTP interception service. We intercept SMS and app-based codes. 95% success rate on UK banking apps...

alert-013.contentSnippet: Multi-brand phishing panel supporting Barclays and HSBC. Includes device fingerprint bypass and geolocation spoofing...

alert-014.contentSnippet: Card testing service - check validity of UK cards against live merchant gateways. Supports Santander and Nationwide BINs...

alert-015.contentSnippet: AI-generated identity packages. Includes credit file seeding guide and bank account opening walkthrough for UK fintechs...

alert-016.contentSnippet: Automated bot for new account creation at UK fintechs. Bypasses selfie verification using deepfake generation...

alert-017.contentSnippet: Standing order manipulation technique. Start with small amounts, escalate over 90 days during dormancy period...

alert-018.contentSnippet: Professional mule herding service. We manage mules and handle transfers. Guaranteed 500 per week per mule account...

alert-019.contentSnippet: Romance scam network using AI deepfake video calls. Targets high-net-worth individuals for investment fund diversion...
Operator testimonial claiming 200k GBP monthly revenue from romance investment scam operation...

alert-020.contentSnippet: Bank callback attack toolkit. Includes scripts for impersonating fraud department staff at NatWest and Barclays...

alert-021.contentSnippet: Fresh UK bank credential dump - 25k HSBC, 18k Lloyds, 12k Barclays, 8k NatWest accounts. Verified within 24 hours...

alert-022.contentSnippet: Mobile phishing kit for Monzo - SMS lure with push notification clone. Captures login, PIN and card details...

alert-023.contentSnippet: International mule network using Revolut and Wise for layering. Converts stolen UK bank funds through multiple jurisdictions...

alert-024.contentSnippet: Courier fraud scripts targeting elderly customers. Impersonate police to convince victims to hand over cards and PINs...
